allow: PowerShell(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'SEO Score: {d[\\"categories\\"][\\"seo\\"][\\"score\\"]*100:.0f}'\); print\(f'Performance Score: {d[\\"categories\\"][\\"performance\\"][\\"score\\"]*100:.0f}'\); print\(f'LCP: {d[\\"audits\\"][\\"largest-contentful-paint\\"][\\"displayValue\\"]}'\); print\(f'TBT: {d[\\"audits\\"][\\"total-blocking-time\\"][\\"displayValue\\"]}'\); print\(f'CLS: {d[\\"audits\\"][\\"cumulative-layout-shift\\"][\\"displayValue\\"]}'\); print\(f'FCP: {d[\\"audits\\"][\\"first-contentful-paint\\"][\\"displayValue\\"]}'\); print\(f'SI: {d[\\"audits\\"][\\"speed-index\\"][\\"displayValue\\"]}'\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const d = require\('./docs/seo-validation/lighthouse-homepage-diagnostic.json'\); console.log\('Performance:', d.categories.performance?.score ? Math.round\(d.categories.performance.score*100\) : 'N/A'\); console.log\('SEO:', d.categories.seo?.score ? Math.round\(d.categories.seo.score*100\) : 'N/A'\); console.log\('Best Practices:', d.categories['best-practices']?.score ? Math.round\(d.categories['best-practices'].score*100\) : 'N/A'\); console.log\('Accessibility:', d.categories.accessibility?.score ? Math.round\(d.categories.accessibility.score*100\) : 'N/A'\); console.log\('FCP:', d.audits['first-contentful-paint']?.displayValue || 'N/A'\); console.log\('LCP:', d.audits['largest-contentful-paint']?.displayValue || 'N/A'\); console.log\('TBT:', d.audits['total-blocking-time']?.displayValue || 'N/A'\); console.log\('CLS:', d.audits['cumulative-layout-shift']?.displayValue || 'N/A'\); console.log\('SI:', d.audits['speed-index']?.displayValue || 'N/A'\);")
